Manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]],<ref name="FF" /> '''Onyx 2''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] which was part of a limited production run of its class.<ref name="CCG" /> The TIE/D Defender was an experimental<ref name="EGVV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], and as testing for its prototype indicated the need for a more powerful [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], such a hyperdrive was added to Onyx 2's production model. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Onyx 2 was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Onyx Squadron/Legends|Onyx Squadron]]. The Defender's crew consisted of a [[TIE pilot]].<ref name="CCG" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Onyx 2}} is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], the events of which are dated to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Onyx 2 was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Yorr/Legends|Yorr]],<ref name="CCG" /> a respected Imperial test pilot holding the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] by that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="Death Star II personnel">{{SW|url=news/death-star-ii-personnel-and-imperial-human-resources|text=Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide|nolive=1}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Onyx 2 was introduced on a card in [[2000]]'s ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
